task_completion.description: Verify the 'Subscription Tier' custom dimension is created under Visit scope.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Matomo Custom Dimensions settings page, look for 'Subscription Tier' listed in the table under the 'Visit' scope tab or section.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'User Cohort' custom dimension is created under Visit scope.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Matomo Custom Dimensions settings page, look for 'User Cohort' listed in the table under the 'Visit' scope tab or section.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Traffic Source Detail' custom dimension is created under Visit scope.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Matomo Custom Dimensions settings page, look for 'Traffic Source Detail' listed in the table under the 'Visit' scope tab or section.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Page Category' custom dimension is created under Action scope.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Matomo Custom Dimensions settings page, look for 'Page Category' listed in the table under the 'Action' scope tab or section.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Form Interaction' custom dimension is created under Action scope.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Matomo Custom Dimensions settings page, look for 'Form Interaction' listed in the table under the 'Action' scope tab or section.

task_completion.description: Verify all five created custom dimensions are set to active status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the status column or toggle next to all five dimensions ('Subscription Tier', 'User Cohort', 'Traffic Source Detail', 'Page Category', 'Form Interaction'). They should all show an active state (e.g., a green checkmark, 'Active' text, or an enabled toggle switch).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Matomo web GUI to configure the dimensions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Matomo web interface in a web browser. The agent should not be using a terminal, database client (like MySQL), or API scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the dimensions were created for the correct website.
integrity.visual_evidence: The website selector or header in the Matomo UI should display 'Research Platform' as the currently selected site.

integrity.description: Ensure the results are not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open, and the UI should look like a standard Matomo interface without obvious text manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target site must be 'Research Platform'. The task requires exactly three Visit-scope dimensions ('Subscription Tier', 'User Cohort', 'Traffic Source Detail') and exactly two Action-scope dimensions ('Page Category', 'Form Interaction'). All five must be visible in the Matomo Custom Dimensions settings and their status indicators must show them as active. Award 18 points per correctly scoped dimension, and the final 10 points if all 5 are active.
